title: Fix Empty Formula Field in Popup
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want to see the formula content when clicking a formula field, so that I can review and understand the field's calculation.
description:
## Bug
When clicking on a formula field in the Cardiff account, the formula popup displays empty content instead of showing the formula definition.

## Reproduction
1. Log in as the Cardiff account
2. Navigate to a formula field
3. Click to view the formula
4. Observe: formula field in the popup is empty

## Fix
Fixed the formula field data retrieval to properly populate the popup content.
acceptance_criteria: Formula popup displays the formula content when clicked
Formula is visible for all formula fields across accounts
ux_changes: Formula popup now correctly displays formula content when a formula field is clicked.
middleware_changes: Fixed formula data retrieval for the popup display.
implementation_notes: Bug was specific to formula field popup data retrieval. Fixed on production.
comment_summary: Developer fixed the issue on production and marked it ready for review.
